title: LogarithmicSpiralBiome
description: generates Overworld biomes in a logarithmic spiral pattern
body:
Generates Overworld biomes in a logarithmic spiral pattern
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/538a48bd3819112ebe66a48a6abec68453765146.jpeg)

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b27e5d4c4d295a53250d207a73c9dceb291a30_0.webp)
## Features
This preset generates Overworld biomes in a logarithmic spiral pattern, using the Overworld origin point X=0, Z=0 as the center of the spiral.
Biome placement expands outward from the origin, forming a curved spiral layout across the world instead of the usual noise-based distribution.

## setting for multiserver
server.properties
```toml
level-name=world
level-seed=
level-type=logarithmicspiralbiome:logarithmic_spiral
```
